name: Oriental Hot Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ingredients to make a marinade.
2. Cut 2-3 lbs of wings into three pieces each. Remove the wingtips and marinate the remaining pieces for at least 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Place a cookie pan lined with foil under the broiler. Using tongs, arrange the marinated wing pieces on the pan, leaving slight space between each piece to prevent sticking.
4. Bake for one hour at 350°F, turning the wing pieces every 10 minutes using tongs to ensure even cooking and prevent burning.
5. Allow the wings to rest for at least 20 minutes before serving at room temperature or hot.
